heading: Definition
label: 45101 Definition
text: In this chapter, “controlled substance” means any substance under section 102 of the Comprehensive Drug Abuse Prevention and Control Act of 1970 () specified by the Administrator of the Federal Aviation Administration.21 U.S.C. 802
